name: Barbecue Meatloaf Aussie Style- First Prize
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dry red wine OR beef stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine meats, breadcrumbs, onions, salt, pepper, garlic, parsley, curry powder, and egg in a large bowl. Mix well.
2. Mix milk and water separately, then add to the meat mixture gradually until smooth but firm.
3. Shape the mixture into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
4. Bake at 375F for 30 minutes.
5. SAUCE: Sauté onions in margarine until golden brown, then add all other ingredients. Bring to a boil slowly, lower heat, and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
6. After the loaf has cooked for 30 minutes, pour half of the sauce over the meat.
7. Return the loaf to the oven and bake for an additional 45 minutes, basting often with the remaining sauce.
8. Serve the loaf hot in thick slices with the remaining sauce. It also makes great sandwiches.
